title: Simply Winged: Horse & Pegasus Flight
description: Transform your horses into majestic flying companions with advanced flight controls, a custom HUD, and Nitro speed boosts.
body:
![Simply Winged: Horse & Pegasus Flight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e0923f2818d93b69ce1a8c2fc03030ba238ef1f.png)

Simply Winged is the ultimate mod for players seeking a complete and logical flight experience in Minecraft. Instead of relying solely on Elytra, this mod grants you the ability to transform your horses into majestic aerial companions. With advanced capabilities and full control, your ordinary travels are transformed into legendary explorations.

![What's New in 1.0.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7604feb67a0b9e41c7caa3db08630fdb233f8b6_0.webp)

**Fixes**
- **Durability System** : Fixed armor durability to decrease and display the correct values accurately.

- **Mending Repair** : Fixed the Mending enchantment to properly restore the armor's durability.

**Improvements**
- **Phantom Repair** : Added support to repair the Winged Horse Armor using Phantom Membranes.

- **Item Renaming** : Polished item names to make winged armor instantly recognizable.

- **Integrated Upgrade** : Merging Elytra with the armor now correctly displays it as an upgrade so you know they are combined.

![Media](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0f7f92a0e243c345073568b7fc849dc635d66f0_0.webp)

![gif 1](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcTN1cjMwYXIwMmp2MDF5a3E4Z3hqdzA4bXlvazdtOGt4d28wZ2tjYSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/RrvHJReO3SzGpEpJic/giphy.gif)

![ph 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/658c911acb94becc716c284df019acf8f5aed651.png)

![Key Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a78169fb550b63e825387c18f70a93ac4a937b18_0.webp)

> 🖥️ **HUD Customization**
> Take full control of your flight interface. You can easily toggle and customize the on-screen information settings using the command: **/sw hud**.

> 🦄 **Advanced & Fluid Flight**
> A dedicated flight system that allows for absolute control over altitude and direction, making horse travel faster, smoother, and more immersive.

> 📊 **Smart Graphical Interface (HUD)**
> A sleek, dedicated HUD that displays your current flight status, real-time speed, and wing durability at a glance.

> 🎒 **Elytra & Armor Integration**
> Seamlessly combine Elytra functionality with various horse armors, merging high-tier protection with the power of flight in a single gear set.

> 🚀 **Speed Boost (Nitro)**
> Don’t just fly—soar! Use the Nitro feature to dash through the skies at high speeds, balanced by a cooldown system to keep gameplay fair and engaging.

> 🎬 **Dynamic Animations**
> Features custom animations that realistically adjust the horse's legs and body posture during flight and landing for a more natural feel.

![Technical Note](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0224b8a9530ba6f8c3492a44eca30392f59835f_0.webp)

**This mod is fully compatible and runs on**: Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.
